Risk_Description: Student ID exposed on public assignment dashboard
Mitigation_Action: Mask Student ID on public views

Risk_Description: Any student can edit or delete an assignment entry
Mitigation_Action: Add role check; allow only assignment owners to edit

Risk_Description: Using external icons without checking compliance
Mitigation_Action: Document all icon origins in IP Register file

Risk_Description: Empty or broken URLs submitted as assignment links
Mitigation_Action: Add HTML5 link/URL format validation in input forms

Risk_Description: Unauthenticated users accessing the CR panel
Mitigation_Action: Implement simple route guarding or separate admin URLs

Risk_Description: Late submissions marked arbitrarily without standard timezone
Mitigation_Action: Use universal system timestamp for all user deadlines
